programs.title: Shattered 3
programs.desc: Viewers will see what impact cruel crimes and offenses have on the lives of victims and witnesses, as well as what the consequences are for those involved.

programs.title: Nightmare Next Door
programs.desc: A series of programs presenting authentic stories of people who disappeared in strange circumstances, and during the investigation it turned out that they were murdered by family members, friends or neighbors whom they had known for years.Murders committed by people close to the victim occur much more often than is commonly believed.Investigations in such cases are difficult and often lead to shocking conclusions.The program used police photos and recordings, and a number of interviews were held with the victims' families.

programs.title: People Magazine Investigates
programs.desc: Extremely experienced crime journalists reveal shocking plot twists and surprising solutions to crime cases known from the media.

programs.desc: Investigation Discovery provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and mystery-focused programming.
